de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation

Class JMLSpecFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation.JMLSpecFactory

  • public class JMLSpecFactory
extends Object
    A factory for creating class invariants and operation contracts from textual JML specifications. This is the public interface to the jml.translation package.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      private static class  JMLSpecFactory.ContractClauses

      private Services services 
      private TermBuilder TB

        Collects local variables of the passed statement that are visible for the passed loop. Returns null if the loop has not been found.

      • translateInfFlowSpecClauses

        private ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> translateInfFlowSpecClauses(IProgramMethod pm,
                                                               ProgramVariable selfVar,
                                                               ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
                                                               ProgramVariable resultVar,

      • translateJoinProcedure

                                      throws SLTranslationException

      • translateAndClauses

        private Term translateAndClauses(IProgramMethod pm,
                                 ProgramVariable selfVar,
                                 ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
                                 ProgramVariable resultVar,
                                 ProgramVariable excVar,
                                 Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
                                 ImmutableList<PositionedString> originalClauses)
                          throws SLTranslationException
        Clauses are expected to be conjoined in a right-associative way, i.e. A & (B & ( C (...& N))). When using auto induction with lemmas, then A will be used as a lemma for B, A & B will be used as a lemma for C and so on. This mimics the Isabelle-style of proving.
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException

      • translateOrClauses

        private Term translateOrClauses(IProgramMethod pm,
                                ProgramVariable selfVar,
                                ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
                                ImmutableList<PositionedString> originalClauses)
                         throws SLTranslationException
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException

      • createFunctionalOperationContracts

        private ImmutableSet<Contract> createFunctionalOperationContracts(String name,
                                                                  IProgramMethod pm,
                                                                  ProgramVariableCollection progVars,
                                                                  JMLSpecFactory.ContractClauses clauses,
                                                                  Map<LocationVariable,Term> posts,
                                                                  Map<LocationVariable,Term> axioms)
        Generate functional operation contracts.
        Parameters:
        name - base name of the contract (does not have to be unique)
        pm - the IProgramMethod to which the contract belongs
        progVars - pre-generated collection of variables for the receiver object, operation parameters, operation result, thrown exception and the pre-heap
        clauses - pre-translated JML clauses
        post - pre-generated post condition
        Returns:
        operation contracts including new functional operation contracts

      • createDependencyOperationContract

        private ImmutableSet<Contract> createDependencyOperationContract(IProgramMethod pm,
                                                                 ProgramVariableCollection progVars,
                                                                 JMLSpecFactory.ContractClauses clauses)
        Generate dependency operation contract out of the JML accessible clause.
        Parameters:
        pm - the IProgramMethod to which the contract belongs
        progVars - collection of variables for the receiver object, operation parameters, operation result, thrown exception and the pre-heap
        clauses - pre-translated JML clauses
        Returns:
        operation contracts including a new dependency contract

      • createJMLClassAxiom

        public ClassAxiom createJMLClassAxiom(KeYJavaType kjt,
                                      TextualJMLClassAxiom textual)
                               throws SLTranslationException
        Creates a class axiom from a textual JML representation. As JML axioms are always without modifiers, they are implicitly non-static and public.
        Parameters:
        kjt - the type where the axiom is declared
        textual - textual representation
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException

      • createJMLDependencyContract

        public Contract createJMLDependencyContract(KeYJavaType kjt,

      • createJMLLoopInvariant

        public LoopInvariant createJMLLoopInvariant(IProgramMethod pm,
                                            LoopStatement loop,
                                            TextualJMLLoopSpec textualLoopSpec)
                                     throws SLTranslationException
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException

      • initiallyClauseToContract

        public FunctionalOperationContract initiallyClauseToContract(InitiallyClause ini,
                                                             IProgramMethod pm)
                                                      throws SLTranslationException
        Translate initially clause to a contract for the given constructor. Exception is thrown if the methods passed is not a constructor. For an initially clause ini the resulting contract looks like:
        requires true;
        ensures ini;
        signals (Exception) ini;
        diverges true;
        Parameters:
        pm - constructor
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException

      • createPrecond

        private ImmutableList<PositionedString> createPrecond(IProgramMethod pm,
                                                      PositionedString originalSpec)
